prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次依次约 7010→4694→5432→22531→12633，波动较大。2024 年因新高考选科分组（再选化学组与再选不限组）导致校线位次出现结构性分化，再选不限组最低位次大幅后移至 22531；2025 年再选不限组回升至 12633，整体呈先降后升走势，近两年基准位次约 12633 名；该校在甘肃省理科组招生计划：2021–2023 年均为 73 人，2024–2025 年物理类 74 人，2026 年物理类计划增至 94 人，较 2025 年扩招约 27%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名约第 84 名（2026 年），在电力行业享有极高声誉，素有“电力黄埔”之称；该校在 2021–2026 年声誉舆情文件中均未被收录，无显著负面事件；抖音热度未进入前 106 名，曝光度一般；无投档断档记录，整体声誉平稳；电气工程为 A 级学科（全国顶尖），动力工程及工程热物理为 A- 级学科。电气类、能源动力类等专业与该校王牌学科高度对应，对理科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化在 2024 年专业热度分析中被评为“高热推荐”，能源动力类为“推荐”，计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业热度持续偏热；甘肃省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 218700 人，较 2025 年（物理类+历史类约 179817 人）明显增长，其中物理类考生估算约 147623 人，较 2025 年增长约 21.6%，竞争加剧。；该校位于北京市，属一线城市，对甘肃省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在甘肃省招生占比约 1.2%–2.2%（2024–2025 年），属跨省招生正常比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年大幅扩招（+27%）与甘肃省物理类考生大幅增加（+21.6%）大致对冲，但电气工程 A 级学科热度持续走高、学校行业龙头地位稳固，报考意愿仍强。在 2025 年基准 12633 名基础上，经 ，区间 14232–15232 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Science Group (including Science/Physics Category) minimum rankings approximately 7010→4694→5432→22531→12633, with significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao subject selection grouping (Chemistry-required group and No-restriction group), the school's admission rankings experienced structural differentiation, with the No-restriction group's minimum ranking dropping sharply to 22531; in 2025, the No-restriction group rebounded to 12633, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing, with a baseline ranking of approximately 12633 in recent two years; the school's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Gansu Province: 73 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 74 students for Physics Category in 2024–2025, and the Physics Category plan increases to 94 students in 2026, an expansion of about 27% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked approximately 84th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings (2026), with a very high reputation in the electric power industry, often called the 'Cradle of Electric Power'; the school has not been included in any reputation or public opinion files from 2021 to 2026, with no significant negative incidents; its Douyin popularity has not entered the top 106, with average exposure; no record of admission interruptions, overall reputation stable; Electrical Engineering is an A-level discipline (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is an A- level discipline. Majors such as Electrical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering are highly aligned with the school's flagship disciplines, attracting strong interest from science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'High Heat Recommended' in the 2024 major popularity analysis, Energy and Power Engineering as 'Recommended', and popular engineering majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be hot; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025 (Physics Category + History Category about 179,817), with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 147,623, an increase of about 21.6% from 2025, intensifying competition; the school is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates; the school's enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 1.2%–2.2% (2024–2025), which is a normal proportion for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the significant expansion in 2026 (+27%) and the substantial increase in Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province (+21.6%) roughly offset each other, but the A-level Electrical Engineering discipline continues to gain popularity, and the school's leading position in the industry remains solid, so the willingness to apply remains strong. Based on the 2025 baseline of 12633, the range is 14232–15232.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14232–15232, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Energy and Power Engineering, Nuclear Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, Supply Chain Management) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<14232), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+14.3%）及历史类考生大幅增加（+21.8%），竞争压力上升。在 2025 年基准 2029 名基础上，经 ，区间 1831–2635 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) were approximately 1728→1512→1542→1753→2029, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing, with a cumulative backward shift of about 500 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 2029 places; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Gansu Province: 8 students (liberal arts) from 2021 to 2023, 7 students (history category) from 2024 to 2025, and the history category plan increases to 8 students in 2026, a slight expansion of about 14.3% compared to 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 84th in the Soft Science main ranking, stable in recent years; the university's reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no record of admission interruptions; Electrical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, both in engineering fields, not directly related to liberal arts majors, but the university's overall strong engineering positioning has a certain brand effect on liberal arts admissions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Gansu Province is about 71,077, an increase of about 21.8% from 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition; the expansion rate (14.3%) is smaller than the examinee growth rate, leading to increased competitive pressure. Beijing, as a first-tier city, has strong appeal to liberal arts examinees; the university's liberal arts enrollment in Gansu Province is small (7–8 students), with a stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of declining rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+14.3%), and the significant increase in history category examinees (+21.8%), competitive pressure rises. Based on the 2025 baseline of 2029 places, the range is 1831–2635 places.
